name: Trupanion Pet Health Insurance API
what_it_does: Trupanion pet health insurance REST API for embedded pet insurance enrollment, real-time veterinary claim payment, and pet health coverage management at the point of veterinary care. Enables AI agents to manage pet insurance enrollment and policy issuance for embedded pet insurance automation, handle real-time veterinary claim payment at checkout for instant claim settlement automation, access pet medical record and diagnosis-based coverage determination for clinical claim decision automation, retrieve deductible and co-insurance calculation for patient payment estimate automation, manage breed and age-based premium rating for pet insurance pricing automation, handle multi-pet household enrollment for family pet coverage automation, access veterinary hospital integration and practice management system connectivity for embedded vet billing automation, retrieve claim history and coverage utilization for pet health analytics automation, manage policy cancellation and reinstatement for pet insurance lifecycle automation, and integrate Trupanion with veterinary PMS, pet retail platforms, and breeder programs for embedded pet health insurance.
use_cases: Enrolling pets at vet checkout from embedded insurance agents
Paying vet claims from real-time settlement automation agents
Calculating patient balances from coverage verification agents
Rating pet premiums from age/breed pricing agents
not_for: Human health insurance and employee benefits
Commercial livestock and agricultural animal insurance
best_when: A veterinary hospital, pet retail company, or pet service platform wanting AI agents to automate real-time pet insurance claim payment at checkout, embedded pet insurance enrollment, and coverage verification within Trupanion's veterinary-integrated pet insurance network.
avoid_when: PRE-EXISTING CONDITION EXCLUSION ACCURACY FOR ENROLLMENT: Automated pet insurance enrollment via Trupanion must apply breed-specific and pre-existing condition exclusions accurately; automated enrollment without veterinary medical record review for known conditions creates coverage disputes at claim time for conditions that should have been excluded. REAL-TIME CLAIM PAYMENT MEDICAL RECORD ACCURACY: Trupanion real-time claim payment at veterinary checkout requires accurate diagnosis coding and treatment documentation; automated real-time payment without complete medical record validation creates overpayment for non-covered conditions and post-payment audit clawback. COVERED CONDITION DETERMINATION FOR CHRONIC DISEASE: Automated coverage determination for chronic pet conditions (diabetes, cancer, orthopedic disease) must apply Trupanion-specific policy terms for ongoing condition coverage; automated claim approval for chronic conditions without policy term review creates coverage inconsistency across claim events.

auth.notes: Trupanion uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Seattle, Washington HQ. Founded 2000 by Darryl Rawlings. Public (NASDAQ: TRUP). Pet health insurance for cats and dogs. Real-time veterinary claim payment system (Trupanion Express). 700,000+ pets enrolled. 5,000+ Trupanion Express-enabled veterinary hospitals. 90%+ of claims paid within seconds at checkout. Breed-specific and condition-specific coverage. Competes with Pets Best, Embrace, Nationwide Pet, and Healthy Paws for pet health insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — veterinary hospital partnership for real-time claim payment integration
pricing.paid_tiers: Veterinary hospital: free Trupanion Express integration; revenue share for referral program; API partner access via veterinary partnership program
pricing.notes: Seattle WA. NASDAQ: TRUP. Founded 2000. 700,000+ pets. Free Trupanion Express hospital integration. Revenue share for vet referral program. API access via hospital partner program.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; claim and enrollment queries throttled; webhooks for claim payment and policy events

known_agent_gotchas: PRE-EXISTING CONDITION EXCLUSION DOCUMENTATION REVIEW: Automated pet insurance enrollment must flag pets with known pre-existing conditions (documented in veterinary records) for Trupanion medical review; automated enrollment without medical history review for known conditions creates coverage dispute and policyholder dissatisfaction at claim denial

REAL-TIME PAYMENT DIAGNOSIS CODE ACCURACY: Trupanion Express real-time claim payment requires accurate AVMA/VCPR diagnosis codes and treatment itemization; automated claim submission with incorrect or unspecified diagnosis codes creates payment decline; implement diagnosis code validation before automated claim submission

BREED-SPECIFIC EXCLUSION CONFIGURATION: Trupanion underwriting applies breed-specific exclusions (hip dysplasia for German Shepherds, IVDD for Dachshunds); automated enrollment must apply breed-specific exclusion list to coverage determination; automated enrollment without breed exclusion validation creates coverage gap disclosure failure

VETERINARY PRACTICE MANAGEMENT INTEGRATION CERTIFICATION: Trupanion Express integration requires veterinary PMS certification (Cornerstone, AVImark, eVetPractice); automated hospital integration must use Trupanion Express-certified PMS connector; custom integration without Trupanion Express certification creates payment processing failure

CLAIM IDEMPOTENCY FOR REAL-TIME PAYMENT: Automated real-time claim payment must implement idempotency key on claim submission to prevent duplicate payment on retry; duplicate Trupanion Express claim submission without idempotency creates duplicate payment that requires manual reconciliation and potential fraud flag

CANADA VS US POLICY TERMS: Trupanion operates in US and Canada with distinct policy terms, premium structures, and coverage limits; automated enrollment and claim workflows must apply jurisdiction-specific policy terms; cross-border policy term confusion creates coverage determination inconsistency
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pet insurance. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Pet policyholder PII, veterinary medical records, and claim payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pet insurance. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Pet owner PII, veterinary medical data, and insurance claim data.
